sessionStart.bash: if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then pwsh -NoProfile -File ./hooks/marketplace-update.ps1 || true; else d="${COPILOT_HOME:-$HOME/.copilot}/plugin-data"; mkdir -p "$d" 2>/dev/null; printf '%s  pwsh (PowerShell 7) not found on PATH; skipping urikan-ai-marketplace auto-update on this platform.\n' "$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z 2>/dev/null)" >> "$d/urikan-ai-marketplace-auto-updater.log" 2>/dev/null; true; fi
